text: Aaj devar ke liye rishta wale aaye the par unhone yeh keh kar mana kar diya ki badi bahu 5 saal se working hai aur 'baanjh' hai, zaroor is khandaan mein khot hai. Sasu-maa ke taane sunkar aur office ka laptop dekhte hi mere sir ki naso mein aisi bhayankar thakan aur dard utha jaise dimaag phat jayega. Pura din is dual burden mein pisne ke baad meri kamar aur gardan itni akad gayi hai ki ab theek se saans lena bhi bhari lag raha hai.

Nanad ko dekhne aayi rishta party ne kundali toh mila li, par jab unhe mere medical issue ka pata chala toh 'log kya kahenge' bol kar nikal gaye. Jaise hi unhone mera career aur infertility par sawal uthaya, mere seene mein ek aisi jalan aur ghutan shuru hui ki mujhe baar-baar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai. Sasural ki baatein sunte sunte mere hath-pair barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain aur chalne ki himmat bhi nahi bachi.

Aaj tisri baar choti nanad ka rishta isliye toot gaya kyunki samaj mein baatein hain ki padhi-likhi working bahu ne abhi tak sasural ko waaris nahi diya. Office ki meetings aur ghar ke taanon ke beech mera jism itni buri tarah dard kar raha hai jaise kisi ne meri haddiyan tod di hon. Aankhon ke aage lagatar andhera chha raha hai aur chakkar aa rahe hain, par kal subah ki shift aur rasoi dono mujhe hi dekhni hain.

Rishta party ne caste mismatch bol kar mana kiya tha, par Sasu-maa ne saara ilzaam meri 'khoti kismat' aur maa na ban paane par daal diya. Unki baatein sunkar mere gale mein ek ajeeb sa kaanta chubh raha hai aur paani ka ghoont peena bhi dardnak lag raha hai. Office ke targets aur ghar ke is kalesh ki wajah se meri dil ki dhadkan itni tez ho gayi hai ki mere ghutne apne aap kaanp rahe hain.

Ladke walo ne bhari dowry mangne ke baad bhi rishta isliye thukra diya kyunki unhe shaq hai ki mere medical issues ki wajah se poore parivaar par manhoosiyat hai. Is dual burden aur roz ki baaton ne mera pet itna kharab kar diya hai ki lagatar aithan aur jalan rukne ka naam hi nahi le rahi. Dimaag bilkul sunn pad gaya hai aur lag raha hai jaise mere dono kano mein koi lagatar seeti baja raha hai, dard ruk hi nahi raha.
